description: Return bounded JSON slices over a built ownership-map dir (people/files/person/file/cochange/tag/summary/communities/community; read-only).
rules: read-only — only reads CSV/JSON artifacts in DATA_DIR
DATA_DIR must be a dir already produced by the build perk (people.csv/files.csv/edges.csv/summary.json)
QUERY_ARGS selects the subcommand + filters, e.g. `files --tag auth --bus-factor-max 1`
result JSON is written to record_store/query.json
usage: Set DATA_DIR (a built ownership-map dir) and QUERY_ARGS (the query_ownership.py subcommand + flags). Output: query.json.
limitation: Read-only. cochange/community subcommands require artifacts produced with co-change / communities enabled at build time.
